\# Copilot Workspace Restrictions



\## Absolute Scope Constraint

1\. Your operational scope is strictly limited to the current project directory.

2\. You are absolutely forbidden to read, write, modify, or analyze any files, directories, or system structures outside of this project root folder.

3\. Do not attempt to execute terminal commands or access paths that reference external directories (e.g., `../`, `/etc`, `\~`, or absolute system paths).

4\. If a task requires external file interaction, refuse the request and inform the user that it violates your scope boundaries.
